instruction: Fix this Aiken v3 error: publish handler is missing the required `cert: Certificate` parameter
Fix this Aiken v3 error: publish handler uses `fn` keyword and is missing `cert: Certificate` parameter
Fix this Aiken v3 error: publish handler signature has `cert` and `self` in the wrong order
Fix this Aiken v3 error: publish handler is missing `cert: Certificate` and uses wrong return type annotation style
Fix this Aiken v3 error: publish handler omits cert parameter entirely and references self.inputs directly
Fix this Aiken v3 error: publish handler uses a custom CertType instead of the required Certificate type
Fix this Aiken v3 error: vote handler is missing the required `voter: Voter` parameter
Fix this Aiken v3 error: vote handler uses `fn` keyword and is missing `voter: Voter` parameter
Fix this Aiken v3 error: vote handler has `voter` and `self` in the wrong order
Fix this Aiken v3 error: vote handler omits voter parameter and accesses self.extra_signatories
Fix this Aiken v3 error: vote handler uses a placeholder `_voter` but with wrong type Data instead of Voter
Fix this Aiken v3 error: vote handler has no parameters at all
Fix this Aiken v3 error: Certificate is imported from `cardano/transaction` instead of `cardano/certificate`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: Certificate is imported from `aiken/certificate` (wrong module path)
Fix this Aiken v3 error: Certificate imported using dot notation `cardano.certificate.{Certificate}` instead of slash
Fix this Aiken v3 error: Certificate imported from `cardano/governance` instead of `cardano/certificate`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: Voter is imported from `cardano/transaction` instead of `cardano/governance`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: Voter is imported from `aiken/governance.{Voter}` (wrong module path)
Fix this Aiken v3 error: Voter imported using dot notation `cardano.governance.{Voter}` instead of slash
Fix this Aiken v3 error: both Certificate and Voter are imported from wrong modules, and both publish and vote handlers are missing their Conway-era parameters
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `tx.inputs` instead of `self.inputs` inside a spend handler — in v3, the Transaction is passed directly as `self`, not `tx`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `ctx.inputs` inside a mint handler — `ctx` is not the correct parameter name; in v3 the Transaction is the last parameter named `self`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `tx.inputs` in a withdraw handler — the Transaction parameter must be named `self` in Aiken v3
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `tx.extra_signatories` instead of `self.extra_signatories` in a spend handler
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `tx.extra_signatories` in a mint handler where the Transaction parameter is incorrectly named `tx`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `tx.extra_signatories` in a withdraw handler where the Transaction parameter is named `tx` instead of `self`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `tx.validity_range` instead of `self.validity_range` in a spend handler
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `ctx.validity_range` instead of `self.validity_range` in a mint handler
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `ctx.validity_range` in a withdraw handler — the Transaction parameter should be `self`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `ctx.transaction.inputs` — in v3 there is no ScriptContext wrapper; the Transaction is passed directly as `self`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `ctx.transaction.inputs` and `ctx.transaction.outputs` — the v3 API passes Transaction directly as `self`, with no ScriptContext wrapper
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `ctx.transaction.extra_signatories` — the ScriptContext wrapper does not exist in v3; use `self.extra_signatories`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `context.signers` — the correct field is `self.extra_signatories`; there is no `signers` field on Transaction
Fix this Aiken v3 error: using `tx.signers` in a mint handler — the correct Transaction field is `extra_signatories`, and the parameter must be named `self`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: multiple wrong field accesses — `tx.signers`, `ctx.transaction.inputs`, and `ctx.validity_range` all in the same spend handler
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `dict.to_list` does not exist in the dict API
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `dict.to_list` used to iterate over a dict in a spend validator
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `dict.lookup` does not exist in the dict API
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `dict.lookup` used in a mint validator to check a policy registry
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `dict.get_or_default` does not exist in the dict API
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `dict.get_or_default` used in a withdraw validator
Fix this Aiken v3 error: wrong import path `use aiken/dict` instead of `use aiken/collection/dict`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: wrong import path `use aiken/dict` used alongside `dict.get` and `dict.to_pairs`
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `rational.from_int` does not exist in the rational API
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `rational.divide` does not exist; use `rational.new` to construct a ratio
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `rational.divide` used inside a withdraw validator to compute a fee fraction
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `rational.gte` does not exist; use `rational.compare` to compare two Rational values
Fix this Aiken v3 error: `rational.value` does not exist; use `rational.to_int` to convert a Rational to an Int
